name: Parse walks and chimeric limits
summary: Bounded pairtools parse behavior for walks/chimeric/supplementary cases.
goal: Clearly bound pairtools parse behavior for walks, chimeric reads, and supplementary alignments with loud failures for unsupported walks.
explicit_non_goals: Do not claim full complex-walk parity unless oracle fixtures prove it.
oracle_commands: pixi run pairtools parse -c tests/fixtures/M050_walk.chrom.sizes --walks-policy 5unique tests/fixtures/M050_walk.sam
candidate_commands: pixi run cargo run -- parse -c tests/fixtures/M050_walk.chrom.sizes --walks-policy 5unique tests/fixtures/M050_walk.sam
acceptance_criteria: Supported walk behavior is covered by deterministic oracle fixtures.
known_risks: Complex walk parity may need several smaller follow-up milestones.
